channel.title: Terry Smith — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Terry Smith (Fundsmith) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Terry Smith: ADDED MSFT (+5%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Terry Smith (Fundsmith) added MSFT in Q4 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Quality compounder top-up.

item.title: Terry Smith: TRIMMED META (-8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Terry Smith (Fundsmith) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 6.5% of portfolio. Small META trim.
